did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of emerging optical imaging technologies (OCT, RCM, MPM) for noninvasive skin biopsy. It describes the physical principles, commercial devices, and clinical applications of these hardware-based imaging modalities. There is no mention of using artificial intelligence, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms to obtain or analyze the study results; the images are presented for visual comparison and educational purposes.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
